metadata.title: Attested Resource Catalog for Expanded Lexicon Datasets
metadata.compiled_by: Lackadaisical Security (The Operator) - Spectre (GPT) - Aurora (Sonnet) - STONEDRIFT 3000
metadata.scope: Resource-level provenance catalog used by the expanded datasets.

unicode_code_charts.title: The Unicode Consortium – Code Charts
unicode_code_charts.scope: script sign/codepoint verification across encoded scripts

oracc_epsd2.title: ORACC ePSD2 – Electronic Pennsylvania Sumerian Dictionary

oracc_dcclt.title: ORACC DCCLT – Digital Corpus of Cuneiform Lexical Texts

tla.title: Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae
tla.scope: ancient Egyptian lemmata, citations, hieroglyphic/hieratic/Demotic texts

perseus_lsj.title: Perseus / LSJ Greek-English Lexicon
perseus_lsj.scope: Greek lemmas and classical source attestations

cal.title: Comprehensive Aramaic Lexicon
cal.scope: Aramaic dialects including Syriac and Nabataean-related corpora

sefaria_bdb.title: Sefaria – Brown-Driver-Briggs Hebrew and English Lexicon
sefaria_bdb.scope: Biblical Hebrew/Aramaic lemmas and source usage

wulfila.title: Wulfila Project – Annotated Gothic Bible
wulfila.scope: Gothic biblical text with lexical/morphological analyses

ada.title: Avestan Digital Archive
ada.scope: Avestan manuscripts and Zoroastrian liturgical texts

cetom.title: CEToM – Comprehensive Edition of Tocharian Manuscripts
cetom.scope: Tocharian manuscripts with transcriptions, translations, commentary

gandhari_dictionary.title: A Dictionary of Gāndhārī
gandhari_dictionary.scope: Gāndhārī/Kharosthi lexical database and manuscript context

damos.title: DĀMOS – Database of Mycenaean at Oslo
damos.scope: published Mycenaean Greek Linear B texts

ctext.title: Chinese Text Project
ctext.scope: Classical Chinese text corpus and dictionary

ctext_dictionary.title: Chinese Text Project Dictionary
ctext_dictionary.scope: Classical Chinese character and word usage lookup

sealang_library.title: SEAlang Library
sealang_library.scope: Southeast Asian dictionaries, corpora, and archival texts

sealang_burmese.title: SEAlang Burmese Dictionary
sealang_burmese.scope: Burmese lexical entries including literary/archaic usage

sealang_thai.title: SEAlang Thai Dictionaries
sealang_thai.scope: Thai and historical Thai dictionary material

dsal.title: Digital Dictionaries of South Asia
dsal.scope: South Asian dictionaries including Dravidian languages

dedr.title: Dravidian Etymological Dictionary / DEDR via DSAL

cleasby_vigfusson.title: Cleasby–Vigfusson Old Norse Dictionary
cleasby_vigfusson.scope: Old Norse / Old Icelandic lexical entries

georgian_corpus.scope: Old, Middle, Modern Georgian corpus resources

classical_armenian_lrc.title: Classical Armenian Online – University of Texas Linguistics Research Center

krapar.title: Krapar / Grabar Classical Armenian Resources
krapar.scope: Classical Armenian grammar and alphabet resources

tibetan_thl.title: Tibetan and Himalayan Library – Tibetan Terms

quranic_arabic_corpus.scope: Quranic Arabic morphology, syntax, ontology, word-by-word grammar

nilk_korean.title: National Institute of Korean Language – Korean-English Learners' Dictionary
nilk_korean.scope: Korean dictionary from South Korea's official language institute
